description: Classical Vedantic concepts, the four yogas, gunas, and cosmological principles — the doctrinal core the Gita teaches

subcategories.name: Dharma and Cosmic Order
subcategories.string: Dharma and Cosmic Order - righteous duty, moral law, right conduct aligned with one's nature and role, cosmic harmony governed by universal ethical principles; adharma as violation causing injustice and disorder

subcategories.name: Karma and Karma Phala
subcategories.string: Karma and Karma Phala - law of cause and effect where actions produce consequences across time; karma yoga as selfless action without attachment to fruits or rewards; moral accountability for all deeds

subcategories.name: The Four Paths of Yoga
subcategories.string: The Four Paths of Yoga - karma yoga as selfless action, bhakti yoga as loving devotion and surrender to the Divine, jnana yoga as wisdom and self-inquiry, raja yoga as meditation and disciplined control of mind; integral synthesis of all paths

subcategories.name: Atman, Brahman, and Self-Realization
subcategories.string: Atman, Brahman, and Self-Realization - the individual eternal soul beyond body and mind; Brahman as ultimate absolute reality; Paramatman as supreme self in all beings; self-realization as direct experience of one's true nature; immortality of the soul

subcategories.name: Maya, Avidya, and Ignorance
subcategories.string: Maya, Avidya, and Ignorance - illusion of material reality mistaken as ultimate truth; spiritual ignorance and blindness to one's true nature; Viveka as discrimination between real and unreal, eternal and transient

subcategories.name: Moksha, Samsara, and Liberation
subcategories.string: Moksha, Samsara, and Liberation - liberation from the cycle of birth death and rebirth; samsara driven by desire and ignorance; bondage versus freedom; path toward ultimate spiritual freedom

subcategories.name: Detachment, Renunciation, and Vairagya
subcategories.string: Detachment, Renunciation, and Vairagya - freedom from attachment to outcomes possessions and desires; vairagya as renunciation of worldly craving; voluntary relinquishing of attachments; non-possessive engagement with life

subcategories.name: Ego, Ahamkara, and False Identity
subcategories.string: Ego, Ahamkara, and False Identity - false identification with the individual self leading to pride and separation; suffering caused by over-identification with personality body or status; ego as root of spiritual ignorance

subcategories.name: Shraddha, Satya, and Ahimsa
subcategories.string: Shraddha, Satya, and Ahimsa - deep spiritual conviction and faith; truth as alignment with ultimate reality and integrity between thought and speech; non-violence and harmlessness in thought word and action

subcategories.name: Yajna, Seva, and Selfless Contribution
subcategories.string: Yajna, Seva, and Selfless Contribution - sacred sacrifice and offering for higher purpose; selfless service without expectation of reward; contribution to the cosmic and social order

subcategories.name: Samatva, Abhayam, and Equanimity
subcategories.string: Samatva, Abhayam, and Equanimity - equal-mindedness in pleasure and pain success and failure; fearlessness as divine courage free from existential anxiety; balanced mind as spiritual ideal

subcategories.name: Sattva, Rajas, and Tamas
subcategories.string: Sattva, Rajas, and Tamas - the three gunas shaping all human nature; sattva as clarity balance purity and luminous understanding; rajas as passion restlessness ambition and agitation; tamas as inertia lethargy delusion and inability to act; their interplay determines all thought feeling and behavior

subcategories.name: Rajasic Distress and Tamasic Suffering
subcategories.string: Rajasic Distress and Tamasic Suffering - rajasic suffering from overambition stress competition anger and hyperactivity; tamasic suffering as depression apathy procrastination numbness and inability to begin; sattvic aspiration toward clarity equanimity and disciplined engagement

description: How one should act in the world — karma, dharma, moral dilemmas, conflict between obligations

subcategories.name: Duty, Obligation, and Righteous Action
subcategories.string: Duty, Obligation, and Righteous Action - moral obligation to act according to one's dharma; tension between duty and emotional bonds; tension between duty and personal desire; performing duty fully without clinging to results; righteous conduct regardless of consequences; professional civic and ethical responsibility

subcategories.name: Action versus Inaction
subcategories.string: Action versus Inaction - paralysis of will and dilemma of whether to engage or withdraw; inaction as spiritual danger when action is required; procrastination and avoidance driven by fear or confusion; overcommitment exhaustion from taking on more than one can sustain

subcategories.name: Burden of Choice and Decision
subcategories.string: Burden of Choice and Decision - existential weight of making consequential decisions; inability to commit between options; analysis paralysis; the moment requiring an irreversible choice

subcategories.name: Moral Conflict and Ethical Dilemma
subcategories.string: Moral Conflict and Ethical Dilemma - internal struggle when competing duties oppose each other; complex situations with no clean answer requiring discernment; competing loyalties between family truth and society; righteous conflict fought to uphold justice

subcategories.name: Violence, Non-Violence, and Just Action
subcategories.string: Violence, Non-Violence, and Just Action - tension between necessity of force and principle of harmlessness; question of whether just goals justify harmful means; ahimsa as foundational ethical principle

subcategories.name: Corruption, Complicity, and Moral Injury
subcategories.string: Corruption, Complicity, and Moral Injury - guilt from going along with injustice or staying silent; facing dishonesty in organizations systems or authority; whistleblowing and moral courage to expose wrongdoing; deep wound from being forced to act against one's values

description: Painful emotional and psychological states — the full suffering spectrum a person arrives with

subcategories.name: Attachment, Clinging, and Possessiveness
subcategories.string: Attachment, Clinging, and Possessiveness - emotional dependence on people outcomes possessions or identity; refusal to let go of what is lost changing or unavailable; need to own or control people and things; romantic obsession and inability to release a harmful relationship

subcategories.name: Desire, Craving, and Greed
subcategories.string: Desire, Craving, and Greed - intense longing for sensory pleasure recognition or material gain; excessive desire for wealth power or status; consumerism and equating worth with possessions; the suffering born from wanting what one does not have

subcategories.name: Addiction, Compulsion, and Digital Distraction
subcategories.string: Addiction, Compulsion, and Digital Distraction - inability to stop destructive behavior despite awareness of harm; social media addiction and compulsive engagement with digital validation; distraction technology and inability to focus; fear of missing out

subcategories.name: Letting Go, Impermanence, and Renunciation
subcategories.string: Letting Go, Impermanence, and Renunciation - releasing what cannot be controlled; accepting endings and transitions; truth that all things change and nothing worldly lasts; voluntary relinquishing of attachments to find inner freedom

subcategories.name: Fear, Anxiety, and Insecurity
subcategories.string: Fear, Anxiety, and Insecurity - feeling of threat or danger real or imagined; chronic unease about uncertain outcomes; persistent sense of not being enough or not belonging; feeling emotionally exposed and vulnerable; inability to tolerate not knowing

subcategories.name: Existential Dread, Fear of Death, and Fear of Failure
subcategories.string: Existential Dread, Fear of Death, and Fear of Failure - deep fear about mortality meaninglessness and the unknown; terror of one's own ending or loss of loved ones; paralysis caused by belief that failure is catastrophic or shameful; fear of judgment rejection or humiliation

subcategories.name: Specific Anxieties
subcategories.string: Specific Anxieties - social anxiety about judgment and rejection; health anxiety about illness and bodily symptoms; financial anxiety about money debt and insecurity; climate anxiety about environmental collapse; phobia and irrational fear disproportionate to actual threat

subcategories.name: Grief, Loss, and Bereavement
subcategories.string: Grief, Loss, and Bereavement - deep sorrow from loss bereavement or ending of something precious; acute grief from death of a loved one; anticipatory grief before an expected loss; lamentation and outward expression of mourning

subcategories.name: Sorrow, Despair, and Hopelessness
subcategories.string: Sorrow, Despair, and Hopelessness - prolonged sadness that settles like weight; melancholy and lingering reflective sadness; complete loss of hope and conviction nothing will improve; inability to imagine a positive future; intense misery and comprehensive unhappiness

subcategories.name: Disillusionment, Dejection, and Nostalgia
subcategories.string: Disillusionment, Dejection, and Nostalgia - low spirits from disappointment; painful discovery that something treasured was not what it seemed; bittersweet ache for what is past; ecological grief for destruction of nature; grief for losses society does not recognize

subcategories.name: Anger, Rage, and Frustration
subcategories.string: Anger, Rage, and Frustration - strong displeasure at injustice betrayal or violation of values; uncontrolled explosive anger; anger from blocked goals repeated failure or powerlessness; aggressive opposition toward another

subcategories.name: Resentment, Hatred, and Contempt
subcategories.string: Resentment, Hatred, and Contempt - chronic bitterness from past unfair treatment; deep intense aversion that consumes its holder; feeling of superiority and dismissal as the most corrosive relational emotion; passive aggression through silence sabotage or withdrawal

subcategories.name: Jealousy, Envy, and Comparison
subcategories.string: Jealousy, Envy, and Comparison - fear of losing affection attention or position to a rival; desire for what others have combined with resentment; suffering from measuring oneself against others; peer comparison and social comparison culture

subcategories.name: Pride, Arrogance, and Ego Inflation
subcategories.string: Pride, Arrogance, and Ego Inflation - destructive pride that prevents growth; exaggerated sense of superiority dismissing others; self-centered focus unable to see beyond personal interests; vanity and excessive concern with self-image and appearance

subcategories.name: Narcissism, Hubris, and Status Obsession
subcategories.string: Narcissism, Hubris, and Status Obsession - deep entitlement inability to empathize and exploitation of others; dangerous overconfidence and belief one is exempt from consequences; tying self-worth entirely to social rank prestige or achievement; intellectual and spiritual arrogance

subcategories.name: Confusion, Doubt, and Indecision
subcategories.string: Confusion, Doubt, and Indecision - lack of mental clarity about an important matter; lack of certainty about one's path beliefs or choices; inability to commit between options; hesitation due to fear or uncertainty

subcategories.name: Overthinking, Mental Conflict, and Overwhelm
subcategories.string: Overthinking, Mental Conflict, and Overwhelm - compulsive repetitive thinking producing no resolution; struggle between opposing thoughts values or desires; inner turmoil as intense emotional disturbance; information overload from too much data or stimulus

subcategories.name: Loss of Direction and Disorientation
subcategories.string: Loss of Direction and Disorientation - not knowing what to do next or where life is going; losing one's bearings in major life transition; existential confusion about what to believe value or build life upon

subcategories.name: Identity Crisis and Existential Crisis
subcategories.string: Identity Crisis and Existential Crisis - loss of sense of who you are during transition or failure; confronting absence of inherent meaning; disillusionment when achievements feel hollow; who am I if I am no longer what I achieved; role confusion between parent professional child partner self

subcategories.name: Purpose, Meaning, and Authenticity
subcategories.string: Purpose, Meaning, and Authenticity - searching for why you exist and what your life is for; courage to live according to one's true nature; inner transformation as genuine change in character; spiritual evolution as deepening of consciousness and compassionate perception

subcategories.name: Mortality, Impermanence, and Suffering
subcategories.string: Mortality, Impermanence, and Suffering - certainty of death and how to live in its shadow; confronting fatal diagnosis and preparing for death; living with chronic pain and persistent physical suffering; truth that all things change and nothing can be held; universal dimension of pain in embodied existence

subcategories.name: Trauma, PTSD, and Invisible Suffering
subcategories.string: Trauma, PTSD, and Invisible Suffering - lasting psychological wound from overwhelming experience; chronic alert and re-experiencing after traumatic events; suffering others cannot see; caregiver fatigue from caring for sick or dependent; survivor's guilt

broad_category: D. Inner Life — Positive and Aspirational States
description: States of flourishing, virtue, and awakening — what one moves toward

subcategories.name: Peace, Equanimity, and Inner Stability
subcategories.string: Peace, Equanimity, and Inner Stability - absence of inner disturbance; balanced mind receiving joy and sorrow with equal composure; deep quiet undisturbed by outer noise; profound calm not dependent on external conditions; rootedness allowing one to face change without being swept away

subcategories.name: Stillness, Acceptance, and Groundedness
subcategories.string: Stillness, Acceptance, and Groundedness - capacity to simply be without agitation or compulsion; genuine peace with what is not resignation but clear-eyed presence; felt sense of being present embodied and connected to what is real; resilience as ability to absorb difficulty and return to equilibrium

subcategories.name: Courage, Fearlessness, and Moral Courage
subcategories.string: Courage, Fearlessness, and Moral Courage - strength to face fear danger pain or uncertainty; spiritual courage rooted in knowledge of one's true nature; willingness to do what is right even when costly or unpopular; boldness to take necessary risks in service of truth

subcategories.name: Determination, Perseverance, and Resilience
subcategories.string: Determination, Perseverance, and Resilience - firm resolve despite obstacles setbacks or discouragement; sustained effort without giving up; firmness of character under pressure; resilience after failure as returning to path and learning without self-destruction; starting over after complete disruption

subcategories.name: Compassion, Empathy, and Universal Love
subcategories.string: Compassion, Empathy, and Universal Love - deep empathy with desire to relieve suffering; ability to understand and share another's feelings; love extended beyond personal bonds to all beings; kindness in small acts of consideration; tenderness toward what is fragile

subcategories.name: Devotion, Forgiveness, and Relational Love
subcategories.string: Devotion, Forgiveness, and Relational Love - loving surrender to Divine guru or higher ideal; mercy and forgiveness as choosing healing over vengeance; parental unconditional love; friendship built on trust honesty and mutual care; romantic and intimate love with its joys and vulnerabilities

subcategories.name: Joy, Bliss, and Contentment
subcategories.string: Joy, Bliss, and Contentment - intense present-moment happiness not dependent on achievement; profound spiritual happiness from union with self or Divine; satisfaction with what is and absence of compulsive wanting; deep sense of meaningful completion

subcategories.name: Gratitude, Awe, and Reverence
subcategories.string: Gratitude, Awe, and Reverence - appreciation for life experiences and what is present; being moved by beauty vastness or sacred dimensions of existence; deep respect and humility before what is greater than oneself; awe and wonder as openings to the sacred

subcategories.name: Discipline, Self-Control, and Tapas
subcategories.string: Discipline, Self-Control, and Tapas - consistent regulation of thought speech and behavior toward higher goals; mastery over senses emotions and impulses; spiritual austerity voluntarily undertaken for purification; power of repeated action and habit to shape character and destiny

subcategories.name: Perfectionism, Procrastination, and Self-Mastery
subcategories.string: Perfectionism, Procrastination, and Self-Mastery - refusal to begin unless results meet an impossible standard; chronic avoidance driven by fear; willpower as disciplined mental force overriding impulse; overwhelm from more demands than one can process; work-life balance and academic pressure

subcategories.name: Humility, Wisdom, and Discrimination
subcategories.string: Humility, Wisdom, and Discrimination - genuine absence of ego and openness to learning; deep understanding guiding right action; ability to distinguish real from unreal lasting from transient; freedom from need to be right

subcategories.name: Surrender, Patience, and Service
subcategories.string: Surrender, Patience, and Service - releasing illusion of control and trusting higher intelligence; capacity to wait and remain present without compulsion; simplicity and freedom from unnecessary complexity; non-judgment as prerequisite for compassion; service and finding purpose through contribution

broad_category: E. Life in the World — Modern and Relational
description: Concrete modern life situations — relationships, work, society — mapped onto Gita teachings

subcategories.name: Heartbreak, Betrayal, and Relationship Breakdown
subcategories.string: Heartbreak, Betrayal, and Relationship Breakdown - end of significant relationship through separation or divorce; acute emotional pain from romantic loss rejection or betrayal; discovering that someone trusted has deceived or harmed you; entanglement with controlling abusive or manipulative people

subcategories.name: Loneliness, Isolation, and Social Disconnection
subcategories.string: Loneliness, Isolation, and Social Disconnection - pain of being unseen unconnected or emotionally alone; enforced or chosen separation from community; digital loneliness despite being constantly connected; isolation in crowded environments

subcategories.name: Family Conflict, Generational Tension, and Estrangement
subcategories.string: Family Conflict, Generational Tension, and Estrangement - loss of relationship with parents siblings or children; tension between parents and children over values choices and expectations; competing loyalties and family expectations causing internal conflict; parenting pressure and fear of failure as parent

subcategories.name: Social Pressure, Conformity, and Peer Comparison
subcategories.string: Social Pressure, Conformity, and Peer Comparison - compulsion to match social norms at cost of authenticity; constant comparison with others leading to dissatisfaction; seeking external validation; suffering from measuring oneself against peers

subcategories.name: Forgiveness, Reconciliation, and Trust Repair
subcategories.string: Forgiveness, Reconciliation, and Trust Repair - hard work of releasing grievance and rebuilding trust; choosing healing over vengeance; releasing bitterness without condoning harm; restoring connection after betrayal

subcategories.name: Burnout, Career Dissatisfaction, and Purpose Loss
subcategories.string: Burnout, Career Dissatisfaction, and Purpose Loss - exhaustion from overwork and loss of meaning; feeling work is meaningless misaligned or wasted; doing what earns money but not knowing why; academic pressure and performance demands; work-life imbalance

subcategories.name: Imposter Syndrome, Failure, and Success-Emptiness
subcategories.string: Imposter Syndrome, Failure, and Success-Emptiness - persistent feeling of not deserving one's position; achieving external goals and discovering they do not satisfy; experience of defeat rejection or significant loss; ambition and its cost in relationships health and integrity

subcategories.name: Toxic Environments, Leadership Burden, and Workplace Conflict
subcategories.string: Toxic Environments, Leadership Burden, and Workplace Conflict - enduring hostile unfair or exploitative professional environments; weight of responsibility for others' wellbeing; professional rivalry and unfair treatment; unemployment and financial stress

subcategories.name: Competitive Pressure, Social Comparison, and Ambition
subcategories.string: Competitive Pressure, Social Comparison, and Ambition - suffering from constant comparison rivalry and need to outperform; obsession with status rank and peer achievement; the trap of measuring self-worth by others' success

subcategories.name: Social Injustice, Collective Trauma, and Helplessness
subcategories.string: Social Injustice, Collective Trauma, and Helplessness - witnessing or experiencing systemic discrimination oppression or violence; paralysis of facing problems too large for one person; political disillusionment and despair about institutions; war and collective violence; displacement and exile

subcategories.name: Technology, Information Overload, and Modern Alienation
subcategories.string: Technology, Information Overload, and Modern Alienation - feeling reduced to a function data point or replaceable unit; living in a world where truth is contested and manipulated; distress about environmental collapse and uncertain future; suffering shared across a community generation or society

broad_category: F. Spiritual Seeking and the Sacred
description: The spiritual path — devotion, grace, liberation, guru, and encounter with the divine

subcategories.name: Spiritual Seeking, Purpose, and Meaning
subcategories.string: Spiritual Seeking, Purpose, and Meaning - drive to find truth meaning or God beyond the surface of life; searching for why one exists; existential questioning as genuine spiritual inquiry; the hunger that material success cannot satisfy

subcategories.name: Guru, Guidance, and the Disciple Relationship
subcategories.string: Guru, Guidance, and the Disciple Relationship - sacred bond between spiritual teacher and sincere student; need for a guide when one cannot see clearly; receiving direction from inner wisdom scripture or teacher; completely placing oneself in the hands of a guru

subcategories.name: Faith, Doubt, and Spiritual Crisis
subcategories.string: Faith, Doubt, and Spiritual Crisis - uncertainty about faith practice or existence of the Divine; productive tension between trust in the unseen and rational questioning; dark night of the soul as spiritual dryness or profound disorientation; spiritual doubt as doorway not dead end

subcategories.name: Surrender, Grace, and Divine Intervention
subcategories.string: Surrender, Grace, and Divine Intervention - complete trust in divine will releasing control to higher power; unearned compassionate blessing enabling growth beyond one's own effort; sense that a higher force is acting in one's life; divine guidance through inner wisdom

subcategories.name: Meditation, Awakening, and Inner Practice
subcategories.string: Meditation, Awakening, and Inner Practice - discipline of turning inward as path to truth and stability; sudden clarity fundamentally changing how one sees oneself and the world; gradual deepening of consciousness; transformation of character through sustained practice

subcategories.name: Bondage, Liberation, and the Spiritual Path
subcategories.string: Bondage, Liberation, and the Spiritual Path - contrast between living trapped in ego and living in freedom; path toward moksha through practice knowledge and grace; spiritual evolution as movement from ignorance toward enlightened action

description: Scene-setting and narrative shlokas — Arjuna's breakdown, battlefield context, cosmic vision — emotionally rich but without bhashya

subcategories.name: Battlefield Crisis and Prelude to Conflict
subcategories.string: Battlefield Crisis and Prelude to Conflict - standing at threshold of overwhelming conflict with no clear way back; witnessing forces arrayed before inevitable confrontation; the charged moment before everything changes; leader surveying situation before decisive action; chaos of conflict beginning despite all wish for peace

subcategories.name: Arjuna's Collapse — Grief, Paralysis, and Somatic Crisis
subcategories.string: Arjuna's Collapse - Grief, Paralysis, and Somatic Crisis - sudden inability to act at the crucial moment despite knowing one must; body expressing emotional collapse through physical symptoms of grief and shock; losing grip on one's instrument of purpose; moral paralysis frozen between duty and love; breaking down before one's teacher

subcategories.name: Arjuna's Despair and Lamentation
subcategories.string: Arjuna's Despair and Lamentation - despair so deep that death feels preferable to action; mourning what will be lost before the loss has occurred; grief at the destruction of family and tradition; seeing loved ones as adversaries; false surrender from confusion rather than wisdom

subcategories.name: Seeking Guidance in Crisis and Genuine Surrender
subcategories.string: Seeking Guidance in Crisis and Genuine Surrender - turning to teacher when one cannot see clearly; asking for help from position of complete collapse; genuine admission of helplessness acknowledging one cannot proceed without guidance; desperation as entry point into authentic spiritual inquiry

subcategories.name: Cosmic Vision, Sacred Overwhelm, and Revelation
subcategories.string: Cosmic Vision, Sacred Overwhelm, and Revelation - being confronted with something far larger than oneself; divine revealing its true nature in a vision of reality so vast it is terrifying; overwhelm from perceiving totality of existence at once; scale revelation and sudden awareness of magnitude; receiving a vision one was not prepared for; confronting avoided truth
